PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, BETTY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LASALLE APARTMENTS $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,500.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
